_comment: RAG retrieval eval dataset. `corpus` is the pool of resume bullet points seeded into a throwaway DB and embedded. `queries` are job descriptions retrieval is run against. `relevant_keys` is OPTIONAL ground truth (corpus keys that SHOULD be retrieved) — when present the harness also computes deterministic Recall@k without any LLM calls. Grow this over time; keys must be unique.

corpus.content: Built a REST API in Rust (Axum) serving 10k requests/second with p99 latency under 50ms
Designed gRPC microservices and a service mesh handling inter-service auth and retries
Optimized PostgreSQL queries and added composite indexes, cutting report generation time by 70%
Introduced Redis caching layer reducing database load by 60% during peak traffic
Implemented OAuth2 and JWT-based authentication with role-based access control
Built an event-driven pipeline on Kafka processing 5M events/day with exactly-once semantics
Fine-tuned a BERT model for document classification, improving F1 from 0.81 to 0.93
Built an end-to-end NLP training pipeline with data validation, feature stores, and automated retraining
Designed a retrieval-augmented generation system using sentence-transformer embeddings and a vector database
Deployed models behind a low-latency inference service with ONNX Runtime and dynamic batching
Ran ablation studies on transformer architectures and published findings at an internal research summit
Built a recommendation model that lifted click-through rate by 18% via collaborative filtering
Built Spark ETL jobs transforming 2TB/day of clickstream data into curated analytics tables
Orchestrated 200+ data pipelines with Airflow, adding SLA monitoring and automatic backfills
Modeled a Snowflake data warehouse with dimensional schemas powering executive dashboards
Implemented dbt models and tests to enforce data quality across the analytics layer
Built a near-real-time streaming ingestion layer with Flink reducing data freshness from hours to seconds
Built a React + TypeScript dashboard with reusable component library used across 6 product teams
Reduced initial bundle size by 45% through code-splitting and lazy loading, improving LCP to 1.2s
Led an accessibility initiative bringing the app to WCAG 2.1 AA compliance
Created a design system in Storybook with theming tokens and automated visual regression tests
Migrated services to Kubernetes with Helm charts and horizontal pod autoscaling
Built CI/CD pipelines in GitHub Actions cutting deploy time from 40 minutes to 6
Codified AWS infrastructure with Terraform modules enabling reproducible multi-region environments
Instrumented services with Prometheus and Grafana, reducing mean time to detection by 50%
Owned the product roadmap for a B2B SaaS platform, aligning engineering, design, and sales
Ran customer discovery interviews and translated insights into prioritized feature specs
Defined activation and retention metrics and ran A/B tests that grew onboarding completion by 25%
Led go-to-market for a new analytics module, coordinating a cross-functional launch
Mentored 4 junior engineers and established a code review and onboarding handbook
Reduced on-call pages by 35% by fixing flaky alerts and adding runbooks
Organized a community coding workshop teaching Python basics to 30 high-school students

queries.job_description: We are hiring a Backend Engineer to build high-throughput, low-latency APIs in Rust or Go. You will design microservices, optimize databases, and add caching layers. Experience with PostgreSQL, Redis, and authentication systems is required.

Seeking an ML Engineer to build NLP pipelines. You'll fine-tune transformer models like BERT, build training and retraining pipelines, and deploy low-latency inference services. Familiarity with embeddings, RAG, and vector databases is a plus.

Data Engineer wanted to build large-scale ETL pipelines. You'll work with Spark, Airflow, and data warehouses like Snowflake, and ensure data quality across the analytics layer. Streaming experience with Flink or Kafka is valued.

Frontend Engineer to build performant, accessible React + TypeScript web applications. You'll own a component library and design system, optimize bundle size and Core Web Vitals, and champion accessibility.

Site Reliability Engineer to run our cloud infrastructure. Responsibilities include Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD automation, and observability with Prometheus and Grafana. You'll improve deployment speed and incident response.
Product Manager for a B2B SaaS platform. You'll own the roadmap, run customer discovery, define success metrics, run A/B tests, and lead go-to-market launches across engineering, design, and sales.
Hiring a Head Chef for a fine-dining restaurant. Must have experience designing seasonal menus, managing kitchen staff, sourcing local ingredients, and maintaining food safety standards.
